name: python3-aiowinreg
title: python3-aiowinreg
summary: Registry hive parsing the async way (Python 3)
description:
Registry hive parsing the async way (Python 3)
This package contains a registry hive reader library implementing both async
and regural parsing.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use awinreg because Registry hive parsing the async way (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use awinreg as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `awinreg [options] [args]` as documented upstream for awinreg.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair awinreg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `awinreg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
